note: Pin by immutable commit SHA (`ref`), which is the commit the `tag` (v1.2.0) peels to — the userinfo-bypass fix this app reported landed in v1.2.0. `tag` is informational. Bump deliberately with `make contract-pull REF=<tag-or-sha>` (pull-contract.sh peels a tag to its commit SHA). The contract content (contract.json + CONTRACT.md) is NOT committed here: GitHub is the single source of truth. It is fetched from upstream@ref at wheel-build time (hatch_build.py) and by the scripts/Makefile, and every fetch is verified against the per-file `sha256` digests below (build/pull fails on mismatch). nix/package.nix must pin the same SHA in its `rev` (CI asserts this).
